caption:
Cool Cafe Alert!

If your weekends are for cozy cafe dates, head out to AMG Kaffeehaus in D3. It’s also known as the Mercedes Benz Cafe as it is located in the car showroom itself. 

☕️ Premium coffee
🌳 Aesthetic vibes 
🚙 Luxury cars

🤎 Approximate Spend for 2: AED 80 
(2 iced lattes, 1 dessert)

Tag your coffee date! 

🧢 @by___flap
